title: pelargonium × exornatum
intro: Pelargonium × exornatum, a hybrid plant species, is a type of pelargonium commonly known as the Rose Geranium, belonging to the Geraniaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × exornatum include relieving stress and anxiety, soothing digestive issues, and reducing symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health concerns.
